name: playground-grid
description: Switch the Debug Playground to the Grid scenario (6×6 default = 36 nodes, 60 edges). The force-directed layout should pull a 36-node 4-neighbour grid into a roughly planar / lattice-shaped arrangement.

setup.vlmDescription: Debug Playground overlay with the 'Grid' pill highlighted in blue. The Rows and Cols parameter inputs both read 6. The viewport shows 36 nodes connected as a 4-neighbour rectangular lattice — visually a regular grid that the force solver has untangled into either a roughly planar 6×6 mesh or a slightly bowed surface. Each node has 2-4 visible connections.
